name: @rukkiecodes/native
description: FusionUI mobile — copy-in React Native components. Add one with the CLI; you own the source after that.

text.title: Text
text.description: Typography primitive: size or heading level (H1–H6), weight, colour variants, alignment, truncation, skeleton loading, prefix/suffix, and press support.

button.title: Button
button.description: Button with a press spring, a loading crossfade (the label slides up as the loading state slides in), and an optional gradient fill.

switch.title: Switch
switch.description: A spring-animated toggle: a track-colour crossfade, a sliding thumb, optional track/thumb icons (fade · rotate · scale · bounce) and a background image.
